facts.claim: Bridge.xyz fiat deposit code status on bridge-integration branch
facts.value: Fully implemented on bridge-integration branch — dedicated API module (api_v2/bridgeXyz), dataset builder, tRPC router, webhook handler, and UI display-state machine all present

facts.claim: Bridge.xyz feature flag name in Infinex platform
Bridge.xyz fiat deposit flow — what enters and what exits
facts.value: User deposits fiat (e.g. USD via ACH/wire, EUR via SEPA) into a Bridge virtual account; Bridge converts incoming fiat into USDC and delivers it on the Base chain to the user's Infinex Base EVM wallet address
facts.source_ref: workers/main/src/durableObjects/User/implementation/datasets/bridgeXyz/index.ts — bridgeBaseUsdcDestination() hardcodes currency:'usdc', payment_rail:'base'; getBaseWalletDepositAddress() resolves user's Base EVM address

facts.claim: Settlement stablecoin for Bridge.xyz fiat deposits
Settlement chain for Bridge.xyz fiat deposits into Infinex
facts.source_ref: workers/main/src/durableObjects/User/implementation/datasets/bridgeXyz/index.ts — bridgeBaseUsdcDestination() sets payment_rail:'base'; getBaseWalletDepositAddress() fetches Base chain address

facts.claim: Supported fiat deposit rails confirmed in Infinex platform code (test fixtures)
facts.value: USD via ACH push (ach_push) and wire; EUR via SEPA — confirmed as paymentRails values in display-state tests

facts.claim: Bridge.xyz supported payment rails per currency (provider docs)
facts.value: USD: ACH and wire (US account + routing number); EUR: SEPA IBAN; MXN: SPEI CLABE; BRL: PIX BR codes; GBP: FPS unique account number; COP: Bre-B unique account number

facts.claim: Bridge.xyz virtual account mechanic — what the product does
facts.value: Bridge virtual accounts are permanent, reusable fiat deposit addresses that convert incoming fiat into crypto and deliver it to a specified destination wallet. They give users local deposit details (e.g. US account/routing numbers for ACH or wire). Multiple currencies are supported.

facts.claim: Bridge.xyz virtual account event lifecycle (deposit state machine)
facts.value: funds_received → funds_scheduled (ACH only, in transit) → payment_submitted (crypto payment sent, tx hash preliminary) → payment_processed (confirmed on-chain, final). Also: in_review, refunded, refund_in_flight, refund_failed, account_update, deactivation, activation, microdeposit.

Required — customers must be onboarded and KYC/KYB-approved before Bridge virtual accounts can be created. Infinex platform enforces a multi-step flow: ToS acceptance (tos_pending) → identity verification via Persona KYC link-out (verification_pending) → Bridge under_review → approved.
facts.source_ref: packages/types/src/user/datasets/bridge-xyz/types.ts (status enum); apps/web-app/src/components/features/deposit/constants/bridge.ts (KYC linkout via bridge.withpersona.com); provider-docs: apidocs.bridge.xyz overview

facts.value: Persona (bridge.withpersona.com) — rendered as external link, not iframe
feature_disabled, not_started, tos_pending, verification_pending, under_review, approved, unavailable, support_needed, provider_error

facts.claim: Bridge.xyz deposit entry availability condition (Infinex UI)
facts.value: Bridge.xyz deposit entry is shown only when: feature flag enableBridgeXyz is on, it is the Infinex main wallet (not a vault), and a vault is not currently selected

facts.source_ref: Infinex web search; multiple X/Twitter sources; widely reported acquisition

facts.claim: Bridge.xyz ToS flow mechanism in Infinex
facts.value: Bridge Terms of Service is rendered in an iframe hosted at compliance.bridge.xyz (or compliance.sandbox.bridge.xyz for sandbox); KYC is a separate external link-out to bridge.withpersona.com (not an iframe)
User must have a Base EVM wallet address on their Infinex account before deposit instructions can be generated; wallet_missing is a defined unavailability reason

facts.claim: Bridge virtual account deposit instruction data fields provided to user
facts.value: sourceCurrency, bankName, bankAddress, routingNumber, accountNumber, beneficiaryName, beneficiaryAddress, paymentRails, and destination (currency, paymentRail, address)

unverifiable.claim: Whether MXN, BRL, GBP, COP rails are wired into Infinex's Bridge.xyz integration (beyond USD and EUR)
unverifiable.reason: Bridge.xyz docs confirm those rails exist on the provider side, but the Infinex platform code only shows USD (ach_push, wire) and EUR (sepa) in fixture/test data. The lib_v2/bridge source files that would confirm wired source currencies were unreachable within budget limits.
